name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Looking for 7 donors from your area today -- can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Outraised before our big deadline? | Friend --

We’re just one week out from our next quarterly fundraising deadline -- and it looks like our opponent could outraise us by millions of dollars. **[We’re counting on 7 donors from your area to chip in today to close the gap -- can you help?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUwNzA0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MDQxNjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We’ve got a big lead in the pledged delegate count, which means our opponent is pouring everything he has into winning as many primaries and caucuses as possible to try and stage a comeback. He won two contests already this week, and there's a chance he could win all three on Saturday. If we get complacent, we’ll give up crucial delegates we need to win this nomination -- and we can’t afford to do that.

I’m so grateful for everything you’ve done to help Hillary -- every one of our twenty wins is because of you. **I hope you’ll be one of the 7 donors from your area that we need today. Chip in right now, and let’s go win this nomination:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUwNzA0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MDQxNjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUwNzA0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MDQxNjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUwNzA0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MDQxNjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUwNzA0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MDQxNjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUwNzA0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MDQxNjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUwNzA0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MDQxNjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUwNzA0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MDQxNjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
Dear Friend,

Today Ted Cruz will
continue to meet with families across the state of Wisconsin.

Wisconsin exemplifies
the growth and opportunity that are achievable when we get the
government out of the way and enable small businesses and
families to prosper.

And as Ted Cruz said
yesterday, "What y'all did in Wisconsin is what we need to do in
Washington." That's why Ted Cruz is focused on bringing back jobs
and raising wages through solutions that get the boot of
Washington off the necks of small business owners and once again
allow them to do what they do best: create more jobs, expand
their business, and thrive in the future.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

name: Rand Paul
subject: Why they want me stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for U
body:
Dear Patriot:

Political "experts" in BOTH parties can't
stop talking about who will win the White House and which party
will control the U.S. Senate when the smoke clears after the
November elections.

You and I both know how important these races
are -- especially with Hillary Clinton determined to continue
President Obama's failed policies for four more years and a
critical Supreme Court vacancy on the line.

But Patriot, there's an even bigger reasons
the special interests and tax-and-spenders are going to go
all-out to defeat me in November.

They want to stop everything you and I helped
start together with my election in 2010.

That's why, as this FEC end of quarter is so
critical. And it's why I'm counting your most generous
contribution $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

JOIN OUR MONEYBOMB
TODAY >>

When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, the Big
Government "consensus" in Washington, D.C. was at its height.

Few members of either party dared question
Washington, D.C.'s out-of-control spending and debt. Or
government spying. Or the Federal Reserve's "print-now,
ask-questions-later" policies. Or never-ending military
intervention.

Knowing I would take all of their madness on,
the Big Government establishment of BOTH parties went all out to
defeat me.

But with the help of patriots like you from
all over the country, I shocked the political world and won.

Patriot, it hasn't been easy -- and we have
so much more work to do -- but you and I have made a big
difference together by standing strong unapologetically for
liberty and our Constitution.

Together, we galvanized the country for civil
liberties against the Obama administration's lawless use of
drones.

We stood strong against taxpayer handouts to
foreign governments.

We stopped President Obama's mad rush to gun
control in 2013.

We've fought BOTH parties' rush to hike the
national debt limit, calling for the REAL spending cuts that are
critical if we're ever going to address our $19 TRILLION in debt.

We stopped President Obama's mad dash to put
American boots on the ground in Syria and showed how misguided
military invention sometimes can embolden our enemies --
something that's taboo in most establishment circles.

We forced expiration of Section 215 of the
so-called "PATRIOT Act," which the NSA used to justify it's
unconstitutional bulk collection of data on American citizens.

And just recently, we forced the U.S. Senate
to vote on Audit the Fed and legislation defunding Planned
Parenthood.

At every turn, you and I fighting and
DEFEATING the Washington machine.

That's why they will come after with
everything they have this election year.

They know just forcing these battles is a
"win" for you and me.

The Big Government consensus in Washington,
D.C. is crumbling.

And you and I are holding the sledgehammer.

But Patriot, all of this comes at a price . .

It's made me and my reelection
tax-and-spenders' number-one target.

The only way I will beat them is the same way
I've beaten them before.

With you.

So please, if at all possible, agree to your
most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

We still have work to do.

Let's finish what we started together and
finally restore liberty and the Constitution in America.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

$10 MONEYBOMB >>

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for U.S. Senate 2016

body:
For Immediate Release - This may be your chance to meet Senator
Ted Cruz, John! One supporter will be selected to meet Ted at a
surprise campaign event!

For Immediate Release
- This may be your chance to meet Senator Ted Cruz, John! One
supporter will be selected to meet Ted at a surprise campaign
event!

Enter for your chance to win with a
contribution of just $3 or more.

Someone from the Cruz
Crew will contact the winner with full details - we'll take care
of it all. Good luck!

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY
TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind
is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a
contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter
by making a contribution, click here. To enter without making a
contribution, click here. Void where prohibited. The Promotion
begins on March 21, 2016 at 4PM Central Standard Time and ends on
April 2, 2016 at 11:59pm ("Entry Period"). All entries must be
received by 11:59pm Central Standard Time on the last day of the
contest. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: one (1)
round-trip coach class plane ticket within the continental United
States to Wisconsin (as necessary in sole discretion of sponsor),
on a date to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail
value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay, with an approximate
retail value of $175; one (1) meal with an approximate retail
value of $20; and ground transportation at the discretion of
Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate
total retail value is $995. Odds of winning depend on the number
of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and
permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who
are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or
the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the
age of majority as determined by state law. Details and
qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply.
Restrictions are listed in the Official Rules. Sponsor is Cruz
for President 24 Greenway Plaza, Suite 725, Houston, TX 77046.

subject: a note about Hillary

body:
Hillary knows what it takes to make change | Friend --

When I met Hillary back in law school, I admired that she was idealistic and practical at the same time. She wanted to change things, and she was willing to do the hard work to make it all happen.

She’s been that way ever since -- when she worked with a Republican Congress as first lady to advocate for health care for eight million kids, when she brought global leaders to the negotiating table as secretary of state, and right now as she fights for every last vote in this campaign.

I bet you’re on Hillary’s team because you appreciate what it takes to make change. You want quality health care, good jobs, and affordable college for all Americans, and you understand you can’t just wave a wand and make that happen -- you have to work for it. That’s why you’re working so hard to make Hillary our next president.

Hillary and I truly appreciate that you’re willing to do the work to make change happen. You’ve helped Hillary win 20 victories so far, and the nomination is in sight. **We’ve got a big fundraising deadline on Thursday, and I know Hillary can count on you to keep working hard -- and when you make your first donation today, we’ll send you a free sticker to say thanks. Together, we’re going to make history:**

body:
We have to fight against his vision for our country. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf41fb/1c469400/5988133/351ad80/120416164/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-03-25_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-03-25_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- It's time to face the facts -- Donald Trump is very likely going to be the Republican nominee for president. He's no longer just a sideshow. So we can't ignore his vile, hateful rhetoric and the violence and bigotry it stokes. Even though Republicans have the power to change this debate and condemn Trump, most of them are doing nothing -- including my opponent, Senator Ron Johnson, who has pledged over and over to support Trump if he becomes the Republican nominee for president. **He even went so far as to say he and Trump have a similar appeal.** So we can't just defeat Senator Ron Johnson in November. Together, we also have to stand up to Donald Trump and all he represents. Trump's bigotry and fear have no place in our country, and I have no doubt that we'll prevail. But I need your help to make sure that happens. One of our campaign's biggest deadlines of 2016 is coming up on March 31, and we need to prove our strength against the Republican Party and their tolerance for Trump's abhorrent behavior. **[Will you donate $5 today to help us reach our $100,000 goal by midnight on March 31?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf41fb/1c469400/5988133/351ad80/120416164/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-03-25_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-03-25_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf41fb/1c469400/5988133/351ad81/120416164/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-03-25_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-03-25_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Dinner with George Clooney
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
In the movie Oceans 11, a gang of lovable thieves successfully heist $150 million from a vault in the basement of the Bellagio Hotel and Casino in Las Vegas.
Fueled primarily from high-dollar donations, Hillary Clinton has raised more than that in this campaign, and is now enlisting the support of George Clooney (Danny Ocean) to pad that total at a dinner event that **will cost people up to $353,400 to attend.**
Now, most of us can agree that is an obscene amount of money. It's a sum that would require an employee making the federal minimum wage to work 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, for more than 5 years.
This is what we're up against in this campaign, and why it's so impressive we've held our own raising $5, $10, $27 at a time from working Americans. But with three critical caucuses just a day away, we have to ask:
[**Your $3 contribution to our campaign will help us win three critical caucuses tomorrow, and send a message that you have had ENOUGH of billionaires buying our elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/three-critical-caucuses?refcode=em160325-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/three-critical-caucuses?refcode=em160325-full")
Here is the truth: while tens of millions of Americans are struggling to put dinner on the table, the wealthiest people in this country have never had it so good. And the great question of this campaign is will we restore a vibrant democracy in this country, or will we slide into an oligarchy in which the economic and political life is controlled by a handful of billionaires?
That is our fight, and why your $3 contribution is so important.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/three-critical-caucuses?refcode=em160325-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/three-critical-caucuses?refcode=em160325-full")**

name: Rand Paul
subject: What works?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for U
body:
Patriot,

"[B]e practical and choose from what works."

That's what President Obama told young people
in Buenos Aires, Argentina yesterday, as he dismissed
"interesting intellectual arguments" between capitalism,
socialism, and communism.

My jaw hit the floor when I read this.

What works???

Does he mean ObamaCare? Or his
regulation-happy EPA, which is destroying jobs all over America?
Or his failed foreign policy, which is emboldening our enemies?
Or spending money you don't have -- which has plunged our nation
in $19 TRILLION in debt?

Patriot, I first ran for the U.S. Senate in
2010 to restore "what works" in America -- the founding
principles embedded in the U.S. Constitution.

Today, with my campaign's End of Quarter
Deadline rapidly approaching, I'm counting on your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to help me continue this
fight in the U.S. Senate.

Patriot, it's no secret Big Government
politicians in BOTH parties are failing the American people
miserably today.

Desperate to keep their stranglehold on
power, the big spenders are targeting me for daring to stand up
to them.

After all, I've spent the last six years
fighting every day for our Bill of Rights in the U.S. Senate --
and the constitutional principles that made this country the
greatest and freest in human history.

Today, those principles are hanging by a
thread.

Now, more than ever, we need true patriots
who are willing to fight back.

Whether it's standing up against NSA spying,
the Obama administration's drone use -- or big spending schemes
Members of BOTH parties have cooked up -- I've proven I will
never give in to the status quo.

But I'm counting on you to stand with me.

Will you?

Will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away -- and help me
reach my campaign's crucial $200,000 End of Quarter fundraising
goal?

Help me continue the fight "what works" in
the U.S. Senate -- limited government and maximized human
freedom.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

**" There's growing anxiety within the [Democratic] party that they'll blow a chance to retake the [Senate] chamber because of the GOP's financial edge."**
\-- _Politico_ , 3/24/2016
Friends,

If we take Marco Rubio's seat, we could flip the Senate. Patrick could be the Senator that tips the scales in the Democrats' favor.

**We CANNOT blow this.**

The FEC quarter is almost over, and we're still short of the $50,000 we need to keep fighting.

[**We need you to step up in a big way -- we still have $40,612 to raise before Thursday 's deadline.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2365/738133e4/34616cfd/7f8209fb/2725203932/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160326?refcode=pme160326_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Florida has a gigantic target on it for practically every Republican group with money to spend this election -- and not just because of the presidential race.

We've been named the **#4 Senate seat most likely to flip**. Republican groups will spend whatever they can to keep Marco Rubio's seat. And they can spend millions upon millions of dollars.

We have to be ready. [**The FEC deadline is THIS Thursday. Don 't wait -- give what you can.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2365/738133e4/34616cfd/7f8209fb/2725203932/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160326?refcode=pme160326_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
